name: Pot Roast, Italian Style
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Beef chuck shoulder roast, boneless
1 1/2 cups Hot water, to dissolve above ingredients
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or large pan with a tight-fitting cover, brown the meat in fat. Season with salt and pepper, then remove from the pan and set aside. Pour off any excess fat drippings.
2. Add onion, carrots, and celery to the pot. Cook until vegetables are lightly browned, stirring frequently.
3. Stir in tomato paste, tomato sauce, wine, beef bouillon cubes, sugar, basil, and oregano. Mix well to combine.
4. Return the meat to the pan. Cover and simmer for 2½ to 3½ hours at room temperature, or cook in a preheated oven at 325°F (gas mark 1) for the same amount of time.
5. Turn the meat once during cooking to ensure even browning. When the meat is tender, remove it from the pan and place on a platter. Keep warm and skim off any excess fat.
6. If the sauce is too thin, simmer uncovered until it reaches the desired thickness. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
7. Meanwhile, cook spaghetti according to package instructions and drain well. Serve the sauce over the hot spaghetti and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Slice the meat and spoon a little sauce over each serving.
